name: Kagu
conservationEfforts: Rivière Bleue Provincial Park is the stronghold. Dog control and exclusion fencing. Captive breeding for population supplementation. Predator control across range.
description: Found only in the forests of New Caledonia, this nearly flightless bird with powder-blue plumage and a dramatic crest has no close living relatives. It stamps its feet to flush prey from leaf litter.
